title: crucianella gilanica subsp. nezvensis
intro: Crucianella gilanica subsp. nezvensis, also known as Nezvenska crucianella, is a plant species within the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Nezvenska crucianella are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to produce a tea, which is consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
